# Deliverance For Me

> A free Christian deliverance ministry based in South Africa. We offer personal one-on-one deliverance sessions and in-person training for churches and ministry teams — at no cost, ever.

## About

Deliverance For Me (deliveranceministry.co.za) is a non-profit Christian deliverance ministry. All services are offered freely — there are no fees, donations, or hidden costs of any kind.

## Services

### Free Deliverance Sessions
One-on-one sessions with trained ministers via WhatsApp, Google Meet, or in person. Available to anyone seeking freedom from spiritual bondage, addiction, oppression, or generational cycles. No Christian background required.
- URL: https://www.deliveranceministry.co.za/
- Cost: Free

### Deliverance Ministry Training
Free in-person training for churches, small groups, prayer teams, and ministries. We come to you and equip your team with biblical foundations, practical skills, and ongoing support.
- URL: https://www.deliveranceministry.co.za/training
- Cost: Free
- Format: In-person (we travel to your church or group)
- Who it's for: Churches, pastors, small groups, prayer teams, individual believers, outreach ministries
- No qualifications required — only a willing heart

## What the training covers

1. Biblical foundations — deliverance, authority, and the believer's identity in Christ
2. Recognising the signs — discerning spiritual bondage from natural struggles with wisdom and humility
3. Ministering freedom — how a session unfolds, praying with authority, leading someone gently
4. Safety and aftercare — confidentiality, boundaries, follow-up, helping people stay free

## How to apply for training

Fill in the form at https://www.deliveranceministry.co.za/training, email hello@deliveranceministry.co.za, or WhatsApp +27 64 784 9054. We reply personally.

## Contact

- Email: hello@deliveranceministry.co.za
- WhatsApp: +27 64 784 9054
- Location: South Africa (serving nationally and online)
